text.title: event-sourcing-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the event-sourcing-basics methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Engineer 'fixes a typo' in a stored event; replay diverges; audit trail compromised.
antipattern.fix: Make event tables append-only; add INSERT-only DB grant; correct via a Compensated event.

antipattern.symptom: Event named 'PlaceOrder'; downstream confuses command and fact.
antipattern.root-cause: Author named the trigger, not the result.

antipattern.symptom: Command handler sets order.status='placed' directly without emitting an event.
antipattern.fix: Route every state change through apply_new(OrderPlaced(...)).

antipattern.symptom: Two concurrent appends both succeed at version=4; replay diverges.
antipattern.fix: Add expected_version on append; reject if stream moved.
